prompt:
A neat reservoir monitoring log page showing an EC meter reading entry, with a handheld conductivity meter resting nearby and a timestamped row highlighted on the sheet. The page should suggest calibration awareness and quality tracking, with a reservoir lid and nutrient tools softly blurred in the background to anchor it in hydroponics rather than general chemistry.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future hydroponics-lab aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic paper and instrument textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the log centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a DSPACE monitoring artifact.
